# iosxe_zone_pair_security (Data Source)

This data source can read the Zone Pair Security configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "iosxe_zone_pair_security" "example" {
  name = "ZP_IN_OUT"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Zone description
- `destination` (String) Destination zone
- `id` (String) The path of the retrieved object.
- `service_policy_type_inspect` (String) Configure Zone Pair Service Policy type inspect
- `source` (String) Source zone
